Name: The sound I hear when someone tells me it’s dangerous for a women to travel solo
CTA: Follow @gabby.elyse_ if you’re building a life on your own terms.
Media reqd: B roll traveling
Hook: The sound I hear when someone tells me it’s dangerous for a women to travel solo
Script & Caption:
I grew up hearing that women shouldn’t travel alone.

But I’ve always dreamed about becoming a digital nomad — building something online and exploring the world.

So I booked my first international trip.

I’m going to visit the country my ancestors came from.

Sometimes the life you want starts with doing the thing you were told not to.

Follow @gabby.elyse_ if you’re building a life on your own terms.

Name: Habits I wish I started in my 20s:
CTA: I want to hear your habits in the comments below 👇
Media reqd: B roll of me eating at hummus fit
Hook: Habits I wish I started in my 20s:
Script & Caption:
Caption - 1.	Network with as many people as possible
The old “six degrees of separation” theory said we’re six people away from anyone.
Modern social networks show it’s closer to 3–4 people.

2.	Just start
Fear and paralysis cost more time than failure ever will.

3.	Use a credit card for your gym membership
Pay it every month.
Then lock or cut the card so you don’t overspend.

4.	Travel. Even if you’re alone.
Solo travel is one of the most enriching and self-fulfilling experiences you can give yourself.

5.	Don’t just save. Invest.
Inflation rises. Economies fluctuate.
ETFs compound quietly over time.

6.	Never stop reading and learning
Marketing evolves constantly.
Your value isn’t what you knew yesterday — it’s what you know today.

7.	Don’t hide your passion or support for others
Not everyone has good intentions.
But living with integrity always compounds.

I want to hear your habits in the comments below 👇
